post.description:
Query the AI assistant. Blocks until response is ready.

This is intentionally a sync ``def`` — query_service uses
``client.messages.stream()`` which blocks.  FastAPI will run it
in an external thread-pool automatically.

get.description:
Server-Sent Events stream for pipeline analysis progress.

Polls the DB every 2 seconds and emits the run status as JSON.
The stream closes when the run reaches a terminal status
(completed, failed, or partial).
